daily_question.title: Who wrote the majority of the Psalms?
daily_question.explanation: While the Book of Psalms has multiple authors including Moses (Psalm 90), Solomon, and others, the majority of the 150 Psalms — 73 in total — are attributed to King David. David was a gifted poet and musician, famously called 'a man after God's own heart' (Acts 13:22). His Psalms cover the full range of human emotion from despair (Psalm 22) to great praise (Psalm 23).
